text: Screens are tools. Like any tool, they amplify your intentions.
author: Anuj Phulera, SkillVerse Lead

text: I learned to code from YouTube at 14. Now I'm building apps for my school.
author: Anonymous student, age 16

text: AI doesn't replace teachers. It frees them to teach what matters.
author: Aarav Choudhary, SkillVerse Ideator

text: The best skill is the one you'll actually practice. Start with curiosity.
author: Anuj Phulera

text: Every hour on YouTube is a choice: passive or active. Choose actively.
author: SkillVerse team

text: Discord taught me more about software engineering than any class.
author: Anonymous student, age 17

text: Our data shows: most 'wasted' screen time is actually exploration.
author: SkillVerse research

text: From Screens to Skills isn't a tagline. It's a measurement framework.
author: Anuj Phulera

text: I built a business from a TikTok tutorial. Made my first ₹10k at 15.
author: Anonymous student, age 15

text: The future of education is personalized, project-based, and online.
author: Dhun, Presenter

text: Parents worry about screen time. They should focus on screen content.
author: Preksha, Presenter

text: ChatGPT is the new calculator. Universal tool for universal problem-solving.
author: Anuj Phulera

text: Skill is just consistency over time. The internet gives us both.
author: SkillVerse team

text: What if every student could measure their growth like athletes do?
author: Aarav Choudhary

text: The screen is a portal. What's on the other side depends on you.
author: Anuj Phulera
